pro_brother.song_name: Let My Love Open The Door

content:
Let My Love Open The Door(1980):Pete Townshend ( Of The Who.)
Album - Empty Glass. Single hit To Ten.
Album released in 1980. #9 USA #46 UK.

INTRO:(Original key is C. I did it in key of D because
       that's the key I sing it in. KK.)

(DD  AAA  [ch]G[/ch]..GG  [ch]A[/ch])  (DD  AAA  [ch]G[/ch]..GG  [ch]A[/ch])(x2)

#1.
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]A[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]
When people keep repeating that you'll never fall in love.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]             [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]
When everybody keeps retreating, but you can't seem [/tab]
[tab]   [ch]G[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]
to get enough...[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]//[ch]A[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]   [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]//[ch]A[/ch]
Let my love open the door...Let my love open the door.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]      [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]/ [ch]A[/ch]// [ch]G[/ch]// [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Let my love open the door..to your heart.[/tab]

Let my love open the door, ooh.[/tab]

Let my love open the door.[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]//   [ch]A[/ch]
Let my love open the door, ooh. [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]//  [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
Let my love open the door. [/tab]


#2.
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
When everything feels all over, when everybody seems unkind.[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]          [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
I'll give you a four-leaf clover, take all the worry [/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
out of your mind.[/tab]

CHORUS:#2.

Let my love open the door, to your heart.[/tab]

CHORUS:#3.
[tab][ch]Bm[/ch]
I have the only key to your heart.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch] 
I can stop you falling apart.[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]CM7[/ch]
Try today, you'll find this way,[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                               [ch]A7[/ch] 
Come on and give me a chance to say...[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Bm[/ch]                       [ch]GM7[/ch] 
Let my love open the door, it's all I'm living for.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]A[/ch] 
Release yourself from misery, only one thing's gonna[/tab]
[tab][ch]A7[/ch]
set you free.[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]D[/ch]
That's my love..That's my love.[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]          [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
When tragedy befalls you, don't let it drag you down.[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]D[/ch]     [ch]A[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
Love can cure your problems, you're so lucky I'm around.[/tab]

An eighties smash from Kraziekhat.
